storyInfo: Through Kinseki Channel's broadcast, Momoka tells Mitsukue about her circumstances, Mifune's manipulation of Mitsukue's kaidan, and how she views all this. Mifune does not even have the energy to kill a revenge-bent Tetsuya anymore, and soon finds himself face-to-face with Hoshiguma.

attributes.content: Yes, it's me! I just came back from our Diet friend's place!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Where is Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The venue?!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What about Mio? Has she dealt with them?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No?! She left?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That traitor!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What about the network? Did you record what's going on inside? What about Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Dammit! Get the editors on it NOW and make the footage of her fight with Mio look like she's completely lost control—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What do you mean there's no time?! Hacking? Hijacked network?! Can't deal with it?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What good are you?! Cut the signal if you can't deal with it! The power supply too! The only thing left to air tonight is the apology! Who cares if the signal goes out?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: We can't have someone babbling on MY channel—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hello? Hello?!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Chikusho! Lost the signal?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You idiot! You demand I come and give a personal explanation, that just gives my enemies a chance to strike!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Everything's gone to hell while I was humoring that bastard... even Hannya is gone...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: (Takes a deep breath)
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Calm down.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Clean up the mess and start over. It'll be alright. It's not the first time.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: First, go to the venue and stop those insects. The diet has given the nod on Hoshiguma. All that's left is to clean up public opinion...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Came to cause trouble with your dear Hoshiguma-aneki, have you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Oh my goodness. Should I compliment you for your bravery, or your adorable stupidity?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Look at how beat-up you are. Seems like my men were still playing with you, not knowing that you no longer had any use.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Who did you grab this real sword from? Tell me, and I'll return it to him before he gets angry.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Kinbee... you...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Me?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I don't have time to play with you, Tetsuya.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Your father may have taught you the basics of swordsmanship when you were little, but you have a long, long way to go before you're ready to use it in a real fight.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: A father and son who got turned against each other by a mask. How much do you think you actually understood about the swordplay that he taught you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Turned against?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Yes... turned against each other...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I've said all I needed to say. Now get lost before I change my mind and reunite you with Tessai.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You're the one who should be reunited with my father!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.text: I know. Countless people are watching me. I must tell them the truth.
They love Momoka Hanyuu. They love to watch her panic at all the kaidan that seem to orbit around her.
They love to watch me get scared, not speak the truth, and certainly not the real me...
Yes, I'm afraid of even that.
Being afraid is the biggest common denominator between Haruka Shino and Momoka Hanyuu.

attributes.content: Hello everyone, good... good evening.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I... I'm Momoka Hanyuu... the girl who's so afraid of kaidan, but who just couldn't seem to get away from them.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm sorry for disturbing you all, after that big accident that just occurred on air...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momo-cchi?!
attributes.name: Surprised Fan

attributes.content: Didn't she go missing? How did she suddenly pop up like that?
attributes.name: Confused Fan

attributes.content: Was that emergency broadcast really a kaidan?
attributes.name: Surprised Fan

attributes.content: Is she caught in the middle of a kaidan... and looking for help from us?!
attributes.name: Confused Fan

attributes.content: As you can see, I'm standing here before you.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Strange things seem to happen to me all the time. That's how kaidan are: they appear without warning, and disappear the same way.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But what if I told you that all the kaidan were fake, from the very beginning?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka? Kinseki Channel's really throwing money into her, pulling that disappearing act. What's the kaidan this time?
attributes.name: Sarcastic Passerby

attributes.content: She said they're fake.
attributes.name: Roaming Passerby

attributes.content: What? Is she out of her mind? Does she think we're all stupid? Aren't kaidan all around us all the time?
attributes.name: Sarcastic Passerby

attributes.content: That's what she said. Don't ask me, watch her yourself.
attributes.name: Roaming Passerby

attributes.content: What if I told you that, with the exception of a handful of kaidan associated with the kami, all the shows that I've been on, all the kaidan that I experienced... all of them were fabricated?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm not talking about hypotheticals. I'm talking about true lies.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kinseki Station and the Kinseki Talent Agency deceived you, and I unknowingly became their accomplice.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm sorry.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I won't make any excuses for deceiving you. I'll accept any criticism.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I told you, no TV tonight!
attributes.name: Angry Mother

attributes.content: My classmate told me they're airing something really amazing! Look! The kaidan lady spills the beans on fake kaidan!
attributes.name: Excited Child

attributes.content: I've been a part... of countless lies.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: For example, the original kaidan, the family home of the Ao-Oni of the Kinsekikai in Kajimachi that killed its residents.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It was no paranormal activity, just actual murder.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I now accuse Kouhei Mifune, president of Kinseki Channel and the Kinseki Talent Agency, and the de facto leader of the Kinsekikai yakuza syndicate, of being the mastermind behind all this.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Without any evidence, he suspected me of being in league with his political opponent, Tessai, and plotted to infect me with Oripathy, when I knew nothing of any of it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The 'Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai' was exiled from Mitsukue after taking the fall for his crimes, many years ago. She was framed for my kidnapping, when in fact, she had saved my life.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: When I accidentally stumbled upon the truth behind the kaidan, he wanted to silence me, spreading rumors that I was retiring...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Detective Koretou! Upstairs is absolutely fuming!
attributes.name: Officer on Patrol

attributes.content: This is the eighth time they're ordering us to cut the signal...
attributes.name: Officer on Patrol

attributes.content: What did we do with the last seven orders?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: ...Nothing.
attributes.name: Officer on Patrol

attributes.content: You've got it.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I know you've been unhappy about me saying that things will get better. I stopped believing it myself at some point.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Whatever happens tonight is on me. Let there be one night when the police don't have to grovel to anyone. It's my parting gift to you.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: ...This is what I needed to tell you tonight.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Next, there's something else I want to tell you... about myself.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I know a lot of people think I'm overacting in the shows... you think I'm being dramatic on purpose.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What I want to tell you is that fear has been a constant in Momoka Hanyuu's entire life.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Partly, it's because I was told too many horror stories when I was little, but...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The more important reason is that I grew up in Gokawa, the city infamous for its polluted water.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There, fear is not about serial killers roaming the streets at night, unicycles that bring misfortune, or elevators to hell...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It is about watching your loved ones becoming bedridden all of a sudden, falling while walking on flat ground, and losing the feeling in their hands.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It all happens so naturally, so gradually... and it's too late by the time you realize it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I was one of the lucky ones. I came to Mitsukue, to be bathed in people's attention, be it adoring, judging, or scornful.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: My fear was no longer about pain, illness and death; it was about viewer ratings, losing fans, pressure from the agency, and fabricated kaidan.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It seems such a luxury to fear those things, now that my life is once again under threat.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Isn't it a sort of happiness, to be afraid of kaidan?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: We don't need to face true danger. We lie in our beds, screaming at stories we don't know if they're true, and satisfy ourselves with the sensation of our nerves tightening and relaxing again.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But... I'm afraid I can never enjoy it the same way again.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: This luxury was lost to me forever when I learned that the kaidan that used to scare me were lies, manifestations of greed, murders, and cover-ups.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: From this day forth, kaidan shall no longer be part of Momoka Hanyuu's life.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I hereby announce that I am leaving the Kinseki Talent Agency, and disassociating myself from all Kinsekikai affiliates!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Tetsuya is lying on the ground next to Mifune, wounded but alive.
It is not that the Phidia intended to spare him.

Indeed, Mifune wanted to put an end to this quickly many times, only to be forced back by the suicidal attacks of the young Oni, who seemed to be intentionally aiming himself at the tip of Mifune's sword, just to find a chance to take Mifune down with him.
Momoka's speech coming through the screen beside him only served as a further distraction, and his trembling hands repeatedly missed their mark.

Even as Mifune changed his goal from killing to incapacitation, and then to simply shaking off this maniac in order to deal with the fallout, Tetsuya kept getting up from the ground, in spite of all his injuries.
Meanwhile, Momoka's speech is drawing to a close.
I will continue to walk the performer's path, as long as I live.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I want to bring hope to others, and tell those plagued by fear that there is someone who was once just like you, someone who knows how you feel.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She will sing your story, act your story. She will do all that she can, so that your voices will not fade into darkness.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka wipes away a drop of sweat from her brow.
Wow, I really said a lot, didn't I?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You know, I'm starting to get cold feet now, after having said all that. I'm really timid, after all.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Maybe the kaidan aren't the only lies in our lives. Maybe there are countless more lies like theirs, and the prosperity that we enjoy...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: ...is built upon these lies.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What is that bitch babbling about?!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She doesn't know that everything is built upon faith. She doesn't know that if panic spreads—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But... this is our life. And it will continue, until the end arrives... if it arrives.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Even if it is built upon lies... upon bubbles that might shatter tomorrow, it's still our life...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: A life that I have to learn to love.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Besides, even if a life like this is destined to disappear someday... it's beautiful, isn't it?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: An instant of beauty will be the warmth that stays with us through the cold night, even after everything else falls apart... as long as we keep it in our hearts.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That's all I want to say.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: This has been Momoka Hanyuu, and I apologize for taking up your valuable time.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Perhaps... no, we WILL meet again.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There is no longer any possibility of turning the tables.
The Phidia stares blankly at the figure on the screen.
Oh, you got up again.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Shall we continue?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The bitch is done babbling. You can try to take revenge for your pop now, again.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The young Oni sets his unsteady feet. The Phidia has collected himself, and identifies an opening that will let him put his sword right through the ribs of the Oni when he makes his move.
But the Oni does not move.
Are you scared?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: But even a fool like me can tell that you're finished.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Tetsuya turns around. Mifune's face is ghastly pale, but he does not make a move.
I'm showing my back to you. Aren't you going to kill me?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Not in the mood. There are plenty of other people I want to kill first.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'll come find you when they're all dead.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Oh, and one more thing...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune stares at Tetsuya's back. Suddenly, he blurts out a sentence that even he himself is unsure why he says it.
The words that I said to your father... They were actually for you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tetsuya cannot tell if these words are meant to provoke, or to accomplish something else. He turns and casts one glare at Mifune with bloodshot eyes, before leaving with unsteady steps.
Phew...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Everything feels so surreal, like a dream.
After finishing her speech, she fainted onstage out of excitement.
Everything that happened next was like a blur... in any case, Hoshiguma went upstairs, while Moriuchi, Kichisei, and Sarasa took her downstairs.
She seems to remember fighting and explosions, but it all felt so far away—
Where are we? Kichisei? Moriuchi-san? Sarasa?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Why is Sarasa on the ground... she's asleep?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She fell asleep in the TV station too... does she get tired easy?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No time for this—it's my turn to carry her now!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Where are you, Momoka? Where's Sarasa?
attributes.name: Kichisei's Voice

attributes.content: Did you get lost in the alleys?
attributes.name: Kichisei's Voice

attributes.content: I'm—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Mmph!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Gotcha!
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I... I got her! On my own! I-I might get promoted for this...
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Good thing I had duct tape on me. She's a singer, who knows how loud she can get when she hollers?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I dreamed about 'ninjutsu items' before I became a ninja, but it's only the veterans who get to use the good stuff, while all I have is trash...
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Gotta report this upstairs—
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Gah, I forgot I discharged my terminal so I could enjoy an afternoon of peace and quiet in one of the coffee shops in the alleys.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Then this girl just falls into my hands like that! It's definitely my lucky day.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Where's my Originium Circuit Hyourougan?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: The ninja takes out the Originium Circuit Hyourougan, a spherical Originium appliance with a long wire attached to it, which he connects to the depleted terminal.
It's charging so slowly.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Hey, how about I pull that tape off your mouth, and you sing a song or two for me?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Mmph, mm, mmmh!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Well, it's not like I would do it, even if you nodded.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Did you know? We were looking for you everywhere after you ran away on that motorbike that night. I was the one who searched your house.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Mmh!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Boy, was that a crappy place. Big idol like you, I thought you'd be living in a mansion or something, but you didn't have anything worth shit.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: What's with the collection of garbage by your window, anyway? Some kind of weird obsession?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Mmph—argh! *cough* *cough*!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Say that again?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The tape came loose? I thought I put it on right.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Hmph, who cares, just a frail little idol.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I tell you, not only did I have to check all that weird garbage you had by the window one by one, I also trimmed that dying plant for you.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: You cut Hasuke?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: 'Hasuke'? Oh, that tree sprout was barely even a weed.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Yeah, I did it. What about it? How did you even take care of it? I have no idea, 'cause its leaves were all yellow and brittle. No way it was gonna live, so I put it out of its misery. It was a kindness.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I've grown flowers before, and it takes patience, and endless love and care, you understand? Someone like you—
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Hey, hey, hey, how did you get up? What kind of crappy duct tape was that?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I see, you must know some sort of Arts... you're Ægir, so I guess it's about water? That's it, of course, no wonder the tape came loose.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: But didn't the vets say that only the Infected could use Arts without a unit? That's weird. You couldn't have broken the tape with brute force, could you?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: Nah, of course not. I doubt you've ever lifted anything heavier than an apple! Must be Arts, definitely.
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: So what? What are you gonna do, spray water in my face?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: The novice ninja taunts Momoka, but he keeps his gaze fixed on her eyes.
A cornered beast will fight back, and the same is true for the girl in front of him. What kind of Arts will she use? Mist? A high-pressure jet? Acid spray, even?
He must not let his guard down just because he is facing an idol with no combat experience.
It is unlikely that her Arts would be particularly powerful, and there would be little movement from her microphone-shaped Arts unit when she casts. Better to stay focused on her eyes.
Her eyes will betray all that she is thinking.
For example... murderous intent.
Foolish girl, not knowing her place.
But that is all. Observe her eyes, and analyze her intent, be it the timing of casting, direction, or...
Why is there no intent other than murder?
Before he can react, the ninja feels a dull 'thud' on his head.
Wha-you hit me on the head with your mic? What kind of Arts is...?
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: MURDERER!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: BEAST!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: HEARTLESS DEVIL!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: THIS IS FOR HASUKE!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: W-Wait, calm down—
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: NO I WILL NOT!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: IT WASN'T DEAD YET! HOW COULD YOU—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: HOW COULD YOU CUT MY HASUKE?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka babbles her incoherent vengeful fury, a far cry from the image that she presented on stage just moments ago.
Her microphone finds the ninja, again and again, striking with a fury that even hell does not know...
Stop, stop, no—
attributes.name: Novice Ninja

attributes.content: I WILL KILL YOU, YOU BASTARD! I WILL BEAT THIS HEARTLESS MONSTER TO DEATH!!!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka?! What are you doing?
attributes.name: Stunned Voice

attributes.content: I'M KILLING THE BASTARD WHO KILLED MY HASUKE! I WILL RIP HIM FROM LIMB TO LIMB!!!
attributes.name: Furious Voice

attributes.content: So, you're, er... you're fine?
attributes.name: Stunned Voice

attributes.content: I'M FINE! I'M VERY FINE! I'M GONNA BEAT THIS ASSHOLE INTO A PULP!!!
attributes.name: Furious Voice

attributes.content: M-Momoka, calm down, he's not worth it, we gotta get out of here...
attributes.name: Stunned Voice

attributes.content: The rain of blows finally comes to an end, as footsteps fade into the distance.
That other voice must have belonged to Kichisei, the one who was with Momoka. Yes, it was Kichisei who took Momoka away, it must be her...
Thank you, Kichisei... you're my lucky star—
The novice ninja gives Kichisei his most sincere gratitude before passing out. Not that he is in any condition to verbalize it.
I've been waiting for you. No one can stop you, even after all these years.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Quit posturing. Your men have already scattered. I strolled right on in here.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What business does the 'Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai' have with a man who's already finished?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If you came to take revenge for yourself and Tessai, all you need to do is draw your sword.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hoshiguma shakes her head.
Your crimes have been exposed on your own TV station. Your Diet member upstairs won't help you now, no matter how much bribe money he got from you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: How he may try to cover up his ill-gotten gains is none of my business.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's enough for me that justice will be served for the people you actually killed.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You almost sound like a cop.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yeah, I've been working for the Lungmen police force.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Are you serious?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yes, I am.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I want to laugh, but I'm not quite in the mood tonight. And I thought the L.G.D. was just a gimmick.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I only came to do what I should have done when I took that step twenty years ago. I came to cut my last ties to Higashi.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: And how do you intend to do that? You can't cut yourself off from your past. Karma and fate will always follow you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You could put them in chains, lock them in boxes, but they will escape when you're least prepared, and tear everything into pieces.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The only thing you can cut is my throat, and it would be nothing more than a formality if you did so. Nothing more than venting your anger.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yeah, a formality.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There's nothing I want from you or Mitsukue. All I want is a formality.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A letter of excommunication. Tell all of Mitsukue that Hoshiguma no longer has anything to do with Mitsukue, the Kinsekikai, or the Ao-Oni kaidan.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The tall Phidia blinks, then begins laughing wryly.
I see Lungmen has indeed turned you into a cop, through and through.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But I refuse. We have a better way of disassociating someone.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Cross swords with me. Rebel against the oyabun of the Kinsekikai, and there will be no room left for the Kinsekikai to treat you as one of us, no matter which one of us falls.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Do we really have to do this?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: This is the true meaning of finishing unfinished business from twenty years ago.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: It's just...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune casts a glance around his office.
I rather liked this place, and it would be a shame if a mess was made of it. Let's go somewhere else.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Where?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kajimachi.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You've razed it to the ground.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Our memories remain, don't they?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You're one twisted bastard.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Let's go. Maybe we'll even catch the end of the fireworks show.
attributes.name: Mifune
